organisation: R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd / Aureon Institute
draft_title: Aureon Evidence OS for AI-Driven Scientific Discovery and Auditable SME Automation
positioning: A business/non-academic future-leader route for building a local-first evidence operating system that turns Gary Leckey's AI, scientific-discovery, and workflow-automation corpus into validated, reproducible tools for high-risk research and SME operations.

work_packages.title: Evidence OS core
work_packages.outcome: Auditable local-first workflow runtime, evidence ledger, and grant-ready claim controls.

work_packages.title: Scientific discovery compute
work_packages.outcome: HNC/PEFC/EPAS hypothesis workflows converted into reproducible compute tasks, benchmarks, and falsification protocols.

work_packages.title: SME automation pilots
work_packages.outcome: Compliance, warehouse, and back-office workflows converted into measurable automation pilots with human review gates.

work_packages.title: External validation sprint
work_packages.outcome: Partner review, academic challenge sessions, evidence-quality scoring, and public dissemination pack.

work_packages.title: Commercialisation and governance
work_packages.outcome: Product roadmap, responsible AI controls, data protection pack, IP review, and partner/customer pipeline.

submission_gates: Confirm FLF business/non-academic eligibility and host/organisation requirements in portal guidance.
Build a costed four-year fellowship budget from salary, research staff, compute, equipment, travel, dissemination, and overhead rules.
Verify public profiles before quoting counts: ResearchGate, ORCID, Academia.edu, GitHub.
Resolve or manage Companies House confirmation statement risk before final submission.
Attach only sanitized repo/evidence archives; exclude private finance unless exact use is approved.
